message:
test(frankenterm-core): expand conformance fixtures for UTF-8, scroll, erase, line edit

Add 5 new VT conformance fixtures and update collect_fixture_paths to
discover utf8/, scroll/, and line_edit/ directories (previously only
c0_controls, cursor, erase, sgr were scanned).

New fixtures: two_byte_char (é), three_byte_char (你), scroll_up_basic
(CSI S), el_right (CSI 0 K), insert_line (CSI 1 L).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
